title: compute_nco_per_candidate_v1 — per-candidate NCO enrichment fan-out (v2 of compute_nco_inside_vs_outside_inversion)
description: Multi-source chain: reads tract_classifications_v1 + inversion_candidates.v1 (cross-atlas from inversion-atlas). For each candidate, builds a 2x2 crosstab of {target_class, default=MOSAIC_SHORT} x {tract intersects candidate span} restricted to NCO-like tracts on the candidate's own chromosome, runs Fisher exact (two-sided + one-sided-greater), then BH/Bonferroni-adjusts across candidates. Emits a typed nco_per_candidate_enrichment_v1 envelope.

target.description: Supply either named *_layer_id fields or an ordered source_layer_ids array (order: tracts, candidates).

candidates_layer_id.description: layer_id of the inversion_candidates.v1 envelope (cross-atlas read from inversion-atlas).

target_class.description: Which NCO-like class to test for inside-vs-outside-candidate enrichment.

p_bh_alpha.description: Significance threshold applied to BH-adjusted p-values (drives sig_flag).
